series_metadata.series_description: These files contain correspondence, applications to renew authority to operate a trust department in the State of Ohio, and receipts evidencing deposits of securities.

retention_rules.disposition: Microform: Retain microfilm in operating area as well as off-site storage facility for five (5) years from the time the company ceases to do trust business in Ohio, then destroy. ; Paper: Retain paper copy in operating area until imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked for quality and completeness, destroy. ; Electronic: Retain electronic files for five (5) years from the time the company ceases to do trust business in Ohio, then destroy., Microform: Shred ; Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
